get.description: This endpoint returns the alaska action clipboard. The `dateCreation` given in the format `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.MS`.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filtered for person user id.

parameters.name: computerId
parameters.description: Filtered for computer user id.

parameters.name: dateCreation
parameters.description: Date creation action: date creation format 'AAAA-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.MS'. Example: '2022-10-11 00:00:00.000'
